profile.title: Profile
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.userNotFoundDesc: This user does not exist or you don't have access.

profileSettings.uploadNewAvatar: Upload a new avatar for your profile

overview.welcomeSubtitle: Select a chat on the left or add friends to start messaging.
overview.getMobileAppDesc: Stay connected anywhere by downloading our secure cross-platform application.
overview.subtitle: A messenger with optional end-to-end encryption based on Russian GOST cryptographic standards, digital signatures, and real-time communication.

e2ee.title: Secret Chats
e2ee.desc: Optional end-to-end encryption — create a secret chat and messages are encrypted on the device. Only participants can read them, the server never sees plaintext.

gost.title: GOST Cryptography
gost.desc: Uses GOST R 34.10 (signatures), GOST R 34.11 Streebog (hashing), and GOST R 34.12 Kuznechik (encryption).

realtime.title: Real-Time Messaging
realtime.desc: Instant message delivery via GraphQL subscriptions — no polling, no delays.

groups.title: Groups & Direct Messages
groups.desc: Regular and secret group chats or private 1-on-1 conversations — choose the level of privacy you need.

modern.title: Modern Stack
modern.desc: Built with React, Next.js, NestJS, GraphQL, PostgreSQL, and Redis for reliability and speed.

open.title: Cross-Platform
open.desc: Available as a web app and a mobile app (React Native / Expo) with shared cryptographic core.

home.emptyFriendsTitle: You have no friends here yet
home.emptyFriendsDescription: Add friends to start direct and group chats faster.
home.emptyIncomingDescription: When someone sends you a request, it will appear here.
home.emptyOutgoingDescription: Sent requests will stay here until they are accepted.

saved.title: Favorites
saved.description: A temporary secret bridge between this browser tab and your mobile device. Messages stay in memory on web and persist on mobile.
saved.sidebarDescription: Secret space for notes and phone pairing
saved.pairingTitle: Link this browser with your phone
saved.pairingDescription: Create a short-lived pairing code, then confirm it on mobile to exchange a secret session key.
saved.pairingQrDescription: Open Favorites on your phone and scan this QR to link the browser.
saved.pairingQrUnavailable: QR is unavailable. Use the Pairing ID below.
saved.pairingSafetyHint: After scanning, compare this code with the code shown on your phone.
saved.pairingEmpty: No active pairing request yet. Create one and confirm it on your phone.
saved.pairingMissingRecipients: Open the mobile app first so there is an active secret session to link.
saved.emptyDescription: Your linked phone and browser can exchange secret notes here.
saved.emptyLinkDescription: Link your phone first to start exchanging secret messages.
saved.emptyLocalDescription: You can write local notes without pairing. Pair your phone again to exchange them across devices.
saved.composerDisabled: Link your phone to enable secret sending
saved.composerHint: The composer unlocks after mobile pairing is confirmed.
saved.composerLocalPlaceholder: Write a local note in this tab...
saved.composerLocalHint: Without pairing, this note stays only until page refresh.
saved.maxAttachments: You can attach up to {count} files.

validation.loginMin: Login must be at least 3 characters long
validation.emailMin: Email must be at least 3 characters long
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.passwordComplexity: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 5 characters long
validation.usernamePattern: Username can only contain Russian/English letters, digits, _ and -
validation.nameMax: Name must be at most 30 characters long
validation.namePattern: Name can only contain English letters, digits, and -
validation.descriptionMax: Description must be at most 300 characters long
validation.bioMax: Bio must be at most 300 characters long
